hook: Humor in a bio works best when it still leaves enough room for sincerity.
body: A profile that is all jokes can become hard to trust because nothing feels anchored.

hook: Some men hide behind irony because genuine self-description feels too exposing.
body: Use humor to create ease, then let one or two signals show that there is a real person underneath it.

hook: Use humor to create ease, then let one or two signals show that there is a real person underneath it.
body: A funny line followed by one grounded preference or value often lands better than three layers of deflection.

body: Keep the joke if it feels like you, but pair it with one line that makes you emotionally easier to read.
